summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review; refs without live state are blocked for human review because kind/state/updated_at were unavailable from the preflight artifact.
